prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Nucleosome containing a nick at SHL-2. Entity description: Histone H2B type 1-C/E/F/G/I. Organism: Homo sapiens. Polymer composition: protein/NA. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.

V62 same-target repair probe. E61 explicit context marks: assembly_context homomeric_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Marks are derived from V61 failure grammar class and RCSB non-coordinate metadata only; no coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, or native topology are opened before sealing.
